mapper.select: select user_id, secret, enabled, bind_time, update_time from sys_user_google_auth where user_id = #{userId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user_google_auth(user_id, secret, enabled, bind_time, update_time) values(#{userId}, #{secret}, #{enabled}, now(), now()) on duplicate key update secret = values(secret), enabled = values(enabled), bind_time = case when values(enabled) = 1 then now() else bind_time end, update_time = now()
